mapper.select: SELECT id, step_id, direction, location, content_format, raw_content, parsed_content_json, content_hash, created_time, updated_time, created_by, updated_by, deleted FROM step_payload_content WHERE step_id = #{stepId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY direction ASC, location ASC, created_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE step_payload_content SET content_format = #{contentFormat}, raw_content = #{rawContent}, parsed_content_json = #{parsedContentJson}, content_hash = #{contentHash}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
